title: Employee Code of Conduct
summary: Standards of professional behavior, ethics, and workplace conduct expected from all employees.

title: Leave Policy
summary: Types of leave, entitlements, filing procedures, and approval workflow per Philippine Labor Code.

title: Work-From-Home Policy
summary: Guidelines for remote work eligibility, equipment, connectivity, and performance expectations.

title: Anti-Sexual Harassment Policy
summary: Zero-tolerance policy on sexual harassment per RA 7877 (Anti-Sexual Harassment Act of 1995).

title: Data Privacy Policy
summary: Employee data protection rights and company obligations per RA 10173 (Data Privacy Act of 2012).

title: Expense Reimbursement Policy
summary: Allowable expenses, category limits, filing procedures, and reimbursement timelines.

title: Disciplinary Action Guidelines
summary: Progressive discipline process, offense classifications, and due process requirements per DOLE guidelines.

title: IT Security Policy
summary: Acceptable use of company systems, data security requirements, and incident reporting procedures.
